Name: GPR Core NanoVNA
Description: Primary measurement instrument for characterizing the sensor's S-parameters in response to magnetic fields.

Name: Payload Main Power Regulator
Description: Provides regulated 5V power for the microcontroller and low-power sensors from the tractor's 12V/24V supply.

Name: SMA Coaxial Cable (Port 1)
Product Name: SMA Male to Male RG316 Coaxial Cable (10cm)

Name: SMA Coaxial Cable (Port 2)
Product Name: SMA Male to Male RG316 Coaxial Cable (10cm)

Name: Main Chassis Frame
Description: Main structural frame for mounting all components and providing rigidity. Designed for low weight.

Name: Left Antenna Mount
Description: 3D-printed bracket for mounting the transmit Vivaldi antenna at a 30-degree outward angle.

Name: Right Antenna Mount
Description: 3D-printed bracket for mounting the receive Vivaldi antenna at a 30-degree outward angle.

Name: Electronics Enclosure Base
Description: Base housing for the NanoVNA and Raspberry Pi, providing protection and integrated mounting points.

Name: Electronics Enclosure Lid
Description: Cover for the electronics enclosure, designed to secure with small screws.

Name: NanoVNA Mount (Integrated)
Description: Integrated standoffs within the electronics enclosure base to secure the NanoVNA.

Name: Raspberry Pi Mount (Integrated)
Description: Integrated standoffs within the electronics enclosure base to secure the Raspberry Pi 4.

Name: Power Module Mount
Description: Small 3D-printed bracket to secure the DC-DC step-down and LDO modules within the enclosure.

Name: Drone Quick-Release Adapter
Description: Adapter plate for connecting the payload to a generic drone quick-release mounting system.

Name: M2.5x6mm Screws (NanoVNA/Pi)
Description: Screws for mounting the NanoVNA and Raspberry Pi to their respective standoffs.

Name: M3x10mm Screws (Enclosure/Frame)
Description: Screws for securing the enclosure lid and various structural components.

Name: M3 Nuts
Description: Hex nuts for M3 screws where through-holes are used for assembly.

Name: M3 Heat Set Inserts
Description: Brass threaded inserts for robust screw connections into 3D-printed parts.

Name: SMA Coaxial Cable (Port 1) Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the SMA Coaxial Cable (Port 1) that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: SMA Coaxial Cable (Port 2) Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the SMA Coaxial Cable (Port 2) that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.
